data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Rise In Pre Market Despite Jerome Powell Says Fed Cannot Hold BTC: What's Going On?
data.description: Bitcoin ETFs have shown an increase in premarket, even as Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell made it clear that the central bank has no plans to accumulate Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC).

data.title: Astronauts Sunita Williams, Butch Wilmore's Return From ISS Further Delayed: Now Expected No Earlier Than Late March
data.description: NASA on Tuesday said that it has further delayed the return of astronauts Sunita Williams and Butch Wilmore back to Earth from the International Space Station to at least late March 2025, prolonging their stay at the station for over nine months.

data.title: Trump's DJT Connection Drives This Lesser-Known Crypto Stock's Nearly 3X Surge In A Month
data.description: A publicly traded cryptocurrency company’s shares have nearly tripled in a month following reports of a potential acquisition by President-elect Donald Trump’s Trump Media & Technology Group (NASDAQ:DJT).

data.title: OpenAI Takes A Page From Google's 2007 Playbook, Turns Phones Into AI Hotlines With 1-800-CHATGPT
data.description: OpenAI has launched a toll-free service, 1-800-CHATGPT, allowing users to access ChatGPT for free with a 15-minute monthly call, echoing Google's 2007 GOOG-411 initiative.

data.title: CVS Faces DOJ Lawsuit Alleging Violations Of Controlled Substances Act And False Claims Act Over Opioid Prescriptions
data.description: The U.S. Department of Justice filed a civil complaint against CVS Pharmacy Inc owned by CVS Health Corp, alleging the nation's largest pharmacy chain violated the Controlled Substances Act by filling unlawful prescriptions for dangerous opioid combinations and quantities from 2013 onwards.
